auth.title: eSourcing
auth.subtitle: Enterprise Procurement Platform
auth.brandHeadline: Streamline your procurement with intelligent sourcing
auth.brandBody: Run reverse auctions, manage RFx events, evaluate bids, and award contracts — all in one platform built for enterprise procurement teams.
auth.signInPrompt: Enter your credentials to access the platform

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening across your procurement activities
dashboard.noDeadlines: No submission deadlines in the next 30 days.

events.subtitle: Manage RFI, RFP, RFQ, and ITT events
events.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, ref, or internal ref...
events.noEventsBody: Create your first RFx event to get started.

create.title: Create RFx Event
create.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Supply of Office Furniture — Q2 2026
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the scope, objectives, and requirements...
create.successBody: RFx event {ref} has been created successfully.

detail.confirmPublish: Publish this event? It will be visible to invited suppliers.
detail.confirmClose: Close this event? No further responses will be accepted.
detail.confirmCancel: Cancel this event? This cannot be undone.
detail.confirmCloseAuction: Close the auction? No more bids will be accepted.

publishChecklist.title: Publish Event
publishChecklist.description: Publishing will make this event visible to invited suppliers. Please review the checklist below.
publishChecklist.hasTitleHint: Add a descriptive title to the event.
publishChecklist.hasDeadlineHint: Set a submission deadline so suppliers know when to respond by.
publishChecklist.deadlineFuture: Submission deadline is in the future
publishChecklist.deadlineFutureHint: The submission deadline must be a future date.
publishChecklist.hasLots: At least one lot or scope defined
publishChecklist.hasLotsHint: Add at least one lot to define the procurement scope.
publishChecklist.warningNotAllPassed: Some checks have not passed. You can still publish, but it is recommended to resolve the issues above first.

onboarding.welcomeBody: eSourcing helps you run RFx events, reverse auctions, evaluate bids, and manage awards — all in one platform built for enterprise procurement.
onboarding.eventsSubtitle: Manage RFI, RFP, RFQ, and ITT events
onboarding.inviteByEmailDesc: Suppliers receive a secure one-time portal link — no account required
onboarding.suppliersSubmitBidsDesc: Structured bid forms with line items, pricing, and attachments
onboarding.compareBidsDesc: Ranked bid view makes it easy to evaluate and shortlist
onboarding.multiUserEvaluationDesc: Invite evaluators to score bids blind and reach consensus
onboarding.allSetBody: You can always find this guide again in the Help section. Here are some quick links to get started:

awards.subtitle: Manage award decisions, approvals, and supplier notifications
